name: Accenture
overview: Accenture is a global professional services company specializing in IT services, consulting, and strategy.
hiringProcess: Accenture's process includes cognitive/technical assessment, coding round, communication assessment, and HR interview.
eligibility: 60%+ in academics, strong communication skills, analytical thinking.
preparationTips: Focus on cognitive ability tests, basic coding, and communication skills. Understand Agile methodology.
